accomplishments: First hire in the Machine Learning department of the company's growth acceleration service, leading a team of 3 people.
Train and implement prospect segmentation and rating models for over a hundred clients using AWS, Databricks, MLFlow, and SparkML, generating 500M daily predictions and doubling conversion rates.
Develop ML-based early detection algorithms, reducing the platform spam rate by 37%.
Design and implement a natural language processing deep learning model to classify inbound messages, reducing human workload by 37%.
Conduct data analysis with Spark SQL and Tableau to drive strategic decision-making processes among top management.
Train deep learning models in Pytorch for super-resolution, achieving a 20% error reduction in land surface temperature estimation with applications in wildfire management.
Implement a deep convolutional model for fine-scale georeferencing of thermal data products, improving accuracy in disaster monitoring applications.
Led the architectural design and workflow development for migrating the entire organization to a centralized cloud-based PowerBI application for 30,000 contributors.
Manage the population of the data warehouse using Synapse and Data Factory and design the semantic layer using Azure Analysis Services, reducing costs by 17%.
Definition of platform adoption KPIs and action plans for their improvement.
Publish two papers about the effects of broadband piezoelectric devices in optoacoustic image reconstruction.

education.thesis_title: Blind Super Resolution Applied to Thermal Remote Sensing Data Products
Improvements in optoacoustic image reconstruction using deconvolution filters
